summary: Verified job applicant selection feature in Admin Dashboard. Both Add Employee and Edit Employee modals have functional 'Import from Job Application' dropdowns that auto-fill form fields when a job applicant is selected.

admin_login.details: Logged in with code '4399' as Matthew Guzman (Administrator)

auto_fill_functionality.details: Selecting 'John Doe Test' auto-filled all form fields

edit_employee_modal.details: Modal opens and allows employee selection

job_applicant_selector_edit_modal.label: Import from Job Application
job_applicant_selector_edit_modal.description: Replace employee info with data from a job application

seed_data_creation: None needed - existing job applications used
context_for_next_testing_agent: Job applicant selection feature works correctly. The dropdown shows all job applications from Form Submissions section. Selecting an applicant auto-fills name, email, and phone fields. The feature exists in both Add Employee modal (lines 1906-1943) and Edit Employee modal (lines 2236-2271) in AdminDashboard.jsx.
